article_title: Johnson & Johnson's OTTAVA Robotic Surgical System Meets Pivotal Study Endpoints in Gastric Bypass Trial

content_preview.title: Johnson & Johnson's OTTAVA Robotic Surgical System Meets Pivotal Study Endpoints in Gastric Bypass Trial
content_preview.summary: J&J's table-integrated OTTAVA robot completed all 30 gastric bypass procedures without conversion and met safety endpoints, advancing its FDA De Novo application.
content_preview.body_excerpt:
## Overview

Johnson & Johnson announced on May 5, 2026, that its investigational OTTAVA™ Robotic Surgical System met the primary safety and performance endpoints of the FORTE clinical study, a prospective, multicenter evaluation of the system in Roux-en-Y gastric bypass procedures, according to [a press release published on BioSpace](https://www.biospace.com/press-releases/johnson-johnson-announces-pivotal-clinical-study-results-for-a-new-soft-tissue-surgical-robotic-system). Results were prese...

editor_notes.content_quality: Well-structured, well-sourced news article covering J&J's OTTAVA surgical robot FORTE clinical study. Good use of both BioSpace press release sources. The article clearly distinguishes what is known vs. unknown, and includes appropriate market context about the competitive surgical robotics landscape.
editor_notes.source_verification: Both sources verified from snapshots. source-0 (BioSpace FORTE results): confirmed 30-patient cohort, FORTE study NCT06709261, six US sites, 30 pounds average weight loss at 30 days, OR sizes 243-694 sq ft, five of six sites previously unused for robotics, Dr. Wilson/Abouhalka/Schulam quotes, De Novo application targeting gastric bypass/sleeve/small bowel resection/hiatal hernia. source-1 (BioSpace De Novo submission): confirmed January 8 2026 submission date, De Novo classification, inguinal hernia IDE approval, Polyphonic digital ecosystem, Ethicon instrumentation. All facts check out — article accurately represents the source material.
editor_notes.factual_accuracy: All verified claims are accurate. Cannot publish due to payload hash mismatch only.
editor_notes.tone_assessment: Neutral and professional. Press release quotes are clearly attributed. The analysis section appropriately contextualizes the competitive landscape without editorializing.
editor_notes.originality: Unique coverage of OTTAVA FORTE results. No duplicate found in recent articles.
